description_long: This object consists of two tall, vertical feather flags mounted on round, weighted bases. One flag is predominantly black with white and yellow graphics, while the other is red with white and yellow graphics. Both flags feature a stylized white figure or mascot and bold, blocky text, with the graphics occupying the upper and central portions of the fabric. The flags are supported by slender poles that extend from the bases, keeping the fabric taut and upright. The bases appear to be made of a heavy material, likely to provide stability in outdoor environments. The flags are set on a flat, neutral surface, suggesting use in public or commercial urban spaces.
description: A pair of tall feather flags with weighted round bases, one black and one red, each featuring bold graphics and text. The flags are supported by slender poles and designed for urban display.
description_view_0: Front view showing both flags side by side, clearly displaying the black and red color schemes and the white graphics on each flag.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the circular bases and the alignment of the two flagpoles, with minimal visibility of the flag graphics.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the backs of the flags, with the color and design still visible but less detail on the graphics.
description_view_3: Top-down view similar to view 1, emphasizing the bases and pole positions, with little detail of the flag fabric.
attribute_flag_design: Each flag features a vertical feather shape with a solid color background (one black, one red), a large white stylized figure or mascot, and bold yellow and white text. The graphics are centrally placed, with the text running vertically and a small logo or emblem near the top.
attribute_mounting_type: vertical pole with weighted round base
